case_title: AMIN, M. vs. PEACE, JIM WARREN et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT PEACE, JIM WARREN ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
AMENDMENT TO COMPLAINT DEFENDANT SUED INCORRECTLY AS PACE, JIM WARREN TO BE PEACE, JIM WARREN

C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. DEPT 503B. MICHAEL ROSSOFF, PRO TEM JUDGE. D. CARTER/ N. OLCOMENDY, CLRKS. PARTIES PRESENT: ARNOLD W. EVJE, II FOR PLTF. M. AMIN WITH AUTHORITY TO SETTLE ON BEHALF OF PLTF. WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. ALSO PRESENT, JIM PEACE, PRO PER DEFT. CASE SETTLED OFF OF THE RECORD BY WRITTEN STIPULATED JUDGMENT APPROVED AS TO FORM AND CONTENT NO REPORTER.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PEACE, JIM WARREN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 42 SIXTH STREET #47 SAN FRANCISCO, CA. $866.00 RENT, $188.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,054.00, STAYED UNTIL AUG-07-2001, LEASE FORFEITED, PRINCIPLE INCLUDES PAST DUE RENT $273. U.D. DAMAGES FROM 6/15/01 THROUGH 8/7/01 AND COST $188. WAIVE CLAIMS AND CAUSES OF ACTION PARTIES MAY HAVE GEN. RELEASE AND WAIVER UNDER CIV. CDE. 1542. SEC. DEP. IF ANY APPLIED TO ABOVE DUE. NO OTHER PARTY CLAIMS RIGHT TO POSSESSION. SEE JDGMT.
